name: Field of Ghosts
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Cream butter and sugar, add egg and mix. Add remaining ingredients and mix until smooth. Refrigerate 2 hours. Roll out dough 1/8 inch thick on lightly floured surface. Dip cutters into flour before each use. Place small balls of dough for moon and bat on sheet. Press ghost cookie gently onto dough and stick. Place ghosts on ungreased baking sheet. Bake 6-15 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove small cookies first. Let cool on cooling rack for 5 minutes, then remove from sheet. Frost a sheet cake with chocolate icing. Cover ghost cookies with white icing and add black gel face. Frost moons with orange gel and bats with black gel. Add tufts of grass with green icing and star tip or tip 233. Display ghosts on the cake using craft sticks. Add moon, bats, and jack-o-lantern frosting decorations. Makes 12-15 servings.
